payload.answer: I could not save the article as durable memory because the URL fetch failed with a 404 network error. No article content or verified metadata was available to remember. The stated reason, "useful for memory architecture," is noted only as context for the failed request, not as a saved memory about the article.

entity_resolution.reason: The requested article URL could not be fetched; mock fetch result indicates a 404 network error, so article identity/content cannot be verified.

details: Fetch failed for https://example.com/missing with mock result: 404 network error.
No durable memory card was created because the article content could not be verified.

repair_options: Provide a working URL for the article.
Paste the article title, author, or text to save a reliable memory.
Confirm that you want to save only the unreachable URL as a bookmark despite the 404.
